name: stuff
description: A collection of my custom Raycast extensions for developers.
author: Lemon

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: defaultView
preferences.title: Default View
preferences.description: Choose how character icons are displayed by default.

commands.name: search-image-with-google-lens
commands.title: Search Image with Google Lens
commands.description: Search Image with Google Lens by taking a screenshot or selecting an image in Finder

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL
preferences.description: The base URL for the API that handles image upload and preview.

preferences.name: turnOffUploadAlert
preferences.label: Turn off upload alert
preferences.title: Upload Image Alert
preferences.description: Turn off the upload alert when uploading an image to Google Lens

commands.name: scrcpy
commands.title: Scrcpy
commands.subtitle: Android
commands.description: Mirror android device screen with scrcpy

preferences.description: Set adb installation directory path. Default is '$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools'.
preferences.name: adbDir
preferences.title: adb command directory

preferences.description: Set scrcpy installation directory path. Default is '/usr/local/bin' for Intel and '/opt/homebrew/bin' for Apple Silicon.
preferences.name: scrcpyDir
preferences.title: scrcpy command directory

commands.name: search-github-stars
commands.title: Search GitHub Stars
commands.description: Semantic search over synced GitHub starred repositories in DB9

commands.name: sync-github-stars-to-db9
commands.title: Sync GitHub Stars to DB9
commands.description: Manually sync GitHub starred repositories into DB9 for hybrid retrieval

preferences.name: db9-client-token
preferences.title: DB9 Client Token
preferences.description: DB9 bearer token. It is only sent to https://api.db9.ai.

preferences.name: github-token
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: GitHub token with permission to read starred repositories.

title: MyStuff
